LanguageData.Ammo_22Short_FMJ.label: .22 Short (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_22Short_FMJ.description: Ultra-light cartridge originally designed for self-defense, but now very obsolete.

LanguageData.Ammo_22Short_HP.description: Ultra-light cartridge originally designed for self-defense, but now very obsolete.
LanguageData.Bullet_22Short_FMJ.label: .22 Short bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_22Short_AP.label: .22 Short bullet (AP)
